note: Derived read to compute per team, so figures reconcile across the league.
pythagorean_expected_wins: NFL Pythagorean: expected win share = points_for^2.37 / (points_for^2.37 + points_against^2.37), times the games played (17). The gap between actual wins and this expectation flags a team that beat or fell short of its scoring margin, usually a close-game or turnover-luck signal.
